title: Skyblock Infi-Crea
description: Ever wanted a Skyblock modpack that wasn't as hard to understand? One where you aren't bound to linear quest progression? Well, I have the pack for you.
body:
## Skyblock Infi-Crea

A Skyblock modpack using Skyblock Infinite that has no quests, which in my eyes opens you up to play however you want!

Want an item?
Search REI for how to obtain it! Pretty much every addition to REI that you can get is here! If there is any way of obtaining an item, you can find it there.

This modpack focuses on just having fun with small uncomplicated things like Blocky Bass, Just a Baguette, Frog Legs, and more!

The modpack also contains Create (hence the name), but before you turn away, I think it doesn't actually overshadow everything else.
It actually allows for more fun things like Create: Cafe.


This was mostly made to be played in multiplayer. E4mc comes included with the pack.

While this modpack is trying to be fun, it is also trying to be _as balanced as possible_ and _actually make sense._ It's not very fun to be able to craft diamonds out of dirt. I have made sure that there are no OP recipes. If I end up finding one it will be removed in an update.

<details>
<summary>What else is included?</summary>

OpenLoader - You won't have to worry about adding the Resource/Datapacks.

Optimizations

Basic QoL

_Balanced_ Recipe Additions

Some Other Mods/Datapacks Included:
- Skyblock Infinite
- Create
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Iron Jetpacks
- Item Collectors 
- Bartering Station 
- cobblegenrandomizer
- Let Fish Love
- Backported Paintings 1.21
- I Can't Update - Bundles of Bravery
- BobberDetector
- NoF3
- Compass Cords
- Nature's Compass
- Explorer's Compass
- Untitled Duck Mod
- Curvy Pipes

Create Stuff:
- Create: Crafts & Additions
- Create: Steam & Rails
- Create: Cafe
- Create: Horsepower
- Create: Aquatic Ambition 
- Create: Halitosis
- Create: High Pressure
- Recipe Mods/Datapacks to ensure Skyblock compatibility

</details>
